SCP (Scoring Penalty) — default 20% and explicit override

SCP default: same 20% formula as ZFP. SCP with penaltyOverride=30 means 30% of DNF score. 5 competitors, N=5, DNF score=6. Alice finishes 1st + SCP (default 20%) → 1 + round(0.20×6) = 1+1 = 2. Bob finishes 2nd + SCP (override 30%) → 2 + round(0.30×6) = 2+2 = 4. Carol finishes 3rd → 3. Dave finishes 4th → 4. Eve finishes 5th → 5.

Scoring configuration: No discards. DNF/OCS scoring: A5.2 (series entries).

Rank Sail Helm R1 Total
1st 1 Alice 1 1
2nd 2 Bob 2 2
3rd 3 Carol 3 3
4th 4 Dave 4 4
5th 5 Eve 5 5

R1 — 1 Jan 2025

Place Sail Helm Rank Points
1 1 Alice 1 1
2 2 Bob 2 2
3 3 Carol 3 3
4 4 Dave 4 4
5 5 Eve 5 5

Sail Scoring — sailscoring.ie
